parameters.jsCode: return $json.list.map(r => ({json: r}));

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({model:'minimax/minimax-m2.7',temperature:0.1,messages:[{role:'user',content:'Clean up this company name for a web search: ' + $json.company_name + '

Rules:
- Remove legal suffixes: Pte Ltd, Ltd, Pte. Ltd., LLP, Inc, Corp, Sdn Bhd
- Remove special characters: /, &, @
- Expand common abbreviations only if obvious
- Keep proper nouns and brand names exactly as-is
- If already clean, return as-is
- Do not add any extra words

Examples:
- Pacific Healthcare Holdings Pte. Ltd. -> Pacific Healthcare Holdings
- NKF (Singapore) -> NKF Singapore
- St. Andrew's Mission Hospital -> St Andrews Mission Hospital

Output: cleaned name only, one line.'}]}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({q: $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').first().json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + ' Singapore official website', num: 5}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $json.list.map(r => ({json: r}));
return items;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({model:'minimax/minimax-m2.7',temperature:0.1,messages:[{role:'user',content:'Company: ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').first().json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + '
Serper results:
' + ($('Serper - Search').first().json.organic || []).map(function(r){return r.title + ' | ' + r.link}).join('
') + '
Already used URLs in sheet: ' + $('Prep URL Data').first().json.existing_urls.join(', ') + '

Pick the single best official URL for ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').first().json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + '.

Rules:
- Must not already exist in the already used URLs list
- If all valid URLs are already in the list, output: duplicate
- Prefer .com.sg, .org.sg, .sg domains
- A parent company or group holding URL is acceptable
- Reject: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Recordowl, Healthhub, directories, news articles, government listing pages
- If no valid match exists, output: none

Output: URL only, or duplicate, or none. One line.'}]}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({model:'minimax/minimax-m2.7',temperature:0.1,messages:[{role:'user',content:'Company: ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').first().json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + '
URL: ' + ($json.best_url || '').trim() + '

Is this URL the official website of ' + $('OpenRouter - Clean Name').first().json.choices[0].message.content.trim() + ' or a legitimate parent/group company?

Accept if:
- Domain clearly matches company name or known parent brand
- It is a real business homepage (.com, .org, .sg, .com.sg, .net)

Reject if:
- Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Recordowl, Healthhub, directory, aggregator, news article, government listing
- URL is none

Output rules:
- If accepted: output the URL exactly as given
- If rejected: output empty string

Output: URL or empty.'}]}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name, company_name_clean: $json.company_name_clean, serper_results: $json.serper_results, best_url: $json.best_url, url_validated: $json.url_validated, website_content: $json.website_content, hia_relevant: $json.hia_relevant, industry_segment: $json.industry_segment, hia_batch: $json.hia_batch, company_size: $json.company_size, product_descriptor: $json.product_descriptor, first_name: $json.first_name, role: $json.role, email: $json.email, linkedin_url: $json.linkedin_url, contact_source: $json.contact_source, status: $json.status }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();
return $json.list.map(r => ({json: r}));

const row = $('Filter WF2').first().json;
const pain = $('Parse Pain WF2').first().json;
const websiteContent = (row.website_content || '').substring(0,800);
const body = {
  model: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6', temperature: 0.4,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content:
    'You are writing 4 cold outreach emails on behalf of Sasikumar, Account Executive at RAYN Secure.

RAYN Secure helps Singapore healthcare organisations and their vendors attain CS/DS Essentials certification and comply with HIA 2027.

---

PROSPECT DETAILS:
- First name: ' + (row.first_name||'there') +
    '
- Company: ' + (row.company_name_clean||row.company_name) +
    '
- Industry: ' + (row.industry_segment||'N/A') +
    '
- HIA batch: ' + (row.hia_batch||'N/A') +
    '
- Product/service: ' + (row.product_descriptor||'N/A') +
    '
- Role: ' + (row.role||'N/A') +
    '
- Pain point: ' + (pain.vendor_pain||'N/A') +
    '
- Compliance lead: ' + (pain.compliance_lead||'N/A') +
    '
- Grant eligibility: ' + (pain.grant_eligibility||'N/A') +
    '
- Website summary: ' + websiteContent +
    '

---

CREDIBILITY REFERENCES: Pick 2 most relevant to the prospect sector:
- Eldercare/social service: Sree Narayana Mission, Society for the Aged Sick, Caring Fleet, CFS Centre for Seniors
- Clinic/hospital/AI vendor: Ren Ci Hospital, Tsao Foundation

---

GENERATE 4 EMAILS matching the structure: short hook subject, 60-80 word body, role-aware CTA, arrows for lists in Email 2 and 4.

Email 2 subject: Up to 70% co-funded for ' + (row.company_name_clean||row.company_name) + ''s HIA compliance
Email 4 subject: Should I close the loop, ' + (row.first_name||'there') + '?

Sign off: Best,\nSasikumar

Output JSON with keys: subject_line_1, email_body_1, subject_line_2, email_body_2, subject_line_3, email_body_3, subject_line_4, email_body_4

Valid JSON only. No markdown.'
  }]
};
return [{ json: { requestBody: body } }];

const row = $('Filter WF2').first().json;
const pain  = $('Parse Pain WF2').first().json;
const emails= $('Parse Emails WF2').first().json;
// verification_status comes from the IF Email Valid path
const now   = new Date().toISOString();
return [{ json: {
  company_name:       row.company_name,
  company_name_clean: row.company_name_clean || '',
  serper_results:     row.serper_results || '',
  best_url:           row.best_url || '',
  url_validated:      row.url_validated || '',
  website_content:    row.website_content || '',
  hia_relevant:       row.hia_relevant || '',
  industry_segment:   row.industry_segment || '',
  hia_batch:          row.hia_batch || '',
  company_size:       row.company_size || '',
  product_descriptor: row.product_descriptor || '',
  first_name:         row.first_name || '',
  role:               row.role || '',
  email:              row.email || '',
  linkedin_url:       row.linkedin_url || '',
  contact_source:     row.contact_source || '',
  compliance_lead:    pain.compliance_lead || '',
  vendor_pain:        pain.vendor_pain || '',
  grant_eligibility:  pain.grant_eligibility || '',
  subject_line_1:     emails.subject_line_1 || '',
  email_body_1:       emails.email_body_1 || '',
  subject_line_2:     emails.subject_line_2 || '',
  email_body_2:       emails.email_body_2 || '',
  subject_line_3:     emails.subject_line_3 || '',
  email_body_3:       emails.email_body_3 || '',
  subject_line_4:     emails.subject_line_4 || '',
  email_body_4:       emails.email_body_4 || '',
  verification_status:'valid',
  status:             'enriched',
  enriched_at:        now
}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name, company_name_clean: $json.company_name_clean, serper_results: $json.serper_results, best_url: $json.best_url, url_validated: $json.url_validated, website_content: $json.website_content, hia_relevant: $json.hia_relevant, industry_segment: $json.industry_segment, hia_batch: $json.hia_batch, company_size: $json.company_size, product_descriptor: $json.product_descriptor, first_name: $json.first_name, role: $json.role, email: $json.email, compliance_lead: $json.compliance_lead, vendor_pain: $json.vendor_pain, grant_eligibility: $json.grant_eligibility, subject_line_1: $json.subject_line_1, email_body_1: $json.email_body_1, subject_line_2: $json.subject_line_2, email_body_2: $json.email_body_2, subject_line_3: $json.subject_line_3, email_body_3: $json.email_body_3, subject_line_4: $json.subject_line_4, email_body_4: $json.email_body_4, status: $json.status, enriched_at: $json.enriched_at, linkedin_url: $json.linkedin_url, contact_source: $json.contact_source, verification_status: $json.verification_status }) }}
